$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:annotation block (Annotated-Manuscript Deliverable). A SINGLE block per run carries the whole manifest: the snapshot binding (snapshot_path/sha256/line_count) plus an annotations[] array, one entry per surfaced finding {finding_id, anchor {kind,value}, comment}. Validated by scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py (stdlib subset checker) via scripts/annotation_manifest.py, which validates this wrapper, the nested annotations[] objects (anchor.kind enum, finding_id uniqueness), the no-mutation reverse transform against the bound snapshot (A2), anchor integrity (A3), rendered-span<->manifest multiset equality both directions incl. Must-Fix completeness and rejection of un-manifested/authored spans (A4), and verbatim+renderable comment projection (A5). Comments only; never prose mutation. See docs/annotated-manuscript.md.
title: APODICTIC annotated-manuscript annotation manifest (apodictic.annotation.v1)
